content:
Добрый день!

IMAP на Яндексе активен. Ранее я уже переносила почту с помощью Thunderbird, и всё работало корректно: при подключении аккаунта авторизация проходила через Яндекс, письма подтягивались и переносились без проблем.

Сейчас проблема возникает именно с этими почтовыми ящиками: при попытке добавить их в Thunderbird программа почему-то перебрасывает меня на авторизацию через Google, а не через Яндекс. Из-за этого я не могу подключить ящик и выкачать письма через IMAP.

Подскажите, пожалуйста, с чем это может быть связано и какие есть способы открыть/подключить эти почты именно через Яндекс IMAP? Можно ли как-то принудительно выбрать авторизацию через Яндекс или подключить ящик вручную без переадресации на Google?

Я приложу видео с процессом подключения, чтобы было понятно, на каком этапе происходит переадресация. Посмотрите, пожалуйста, что можно сделать в такой ситуации.

https://youtu.be/Nq6cZ3BGoUw - видео процесса
creator: ryzhihekatt9008

content:
I will guess that you have accidentally installed two copies to different locations, maybe one of them came from the Microsoft Store and the other from Thunderbird.net. Do you have icons for both installations? If so, right-click on each and compare the Properties of one that works the way you like with the one you don't. The properties dialog will look something like the below. What do each say in the "Target" field?

You can also look in the list of in Apps & Features for "Mozilla Thunderbird" to see if it's listed twice. But before you uninstall, please report back here with your findings and we will advise you further.
creator: rednoise

content:
Is it the "From" information that is not to your liking? Are you talking about when viewing the message itself or its listing in the Message List, or both? If the list only and the column name is "Correspondents", try adding a "From" column, which can show slightly different information.

Another setting you can try is found at <Settings | General | Message List>. It has three "Preferred address display format" settings. One of them might be more to your liking.

The actual "From' field is created by the "third-party application" and you can't change that.

Another though occurs to me - if there are a finite number of customers, you could create a Tag for each one, then create a Message Filter that would color the messages from each or move them into their own folder.
creator: rednoise

content: Compacting only deletes messages that you have previously clicked to delete, freeing up space in the folder.
creator: davidsk

content: David, Thanks for your speedy reply. A bit confused how you deliberately "delete messages that you have previously clicked to delete"? That's sorta why I want to do this. I want some but not all messages; mostly from friends or businesses. Thanks
creator: dcal53

content: In mbox files, a deleted message remains, but is marked for delete. That means that it still is taking up space on your computer but is not accessible. As deleted messages increase, this increases the size of the folder. The process of compacting is removing the 'dead' messages from the folder. This is just basic disc space maintenance.
